title: Simplifying, stabilizing, and scaling continuous-time consistency models
titleZh: 简化、稳定和扩展连续时间一致性模型
summary: We’ve simplified, stabilized, and scaled continuous-time consistency models, achieving comparable sample quality to leading diffusion models, while using only two sampling steps.
summaryZh: 我们简化、稳定和缩放了连续时间一致性模型，实现了与领先扩散模型相当的样本质量，同时仅使用两个采样步骤。
highlights: We’ve simplified, stabilized, and scaled continuous-time consistency models, achieving comparable sample quality to leading diffusion models, while using only two sampling steps.
highlightsZh: 我们简化、稳定和缩放了连续时间一致性模型，实现了与领先扩散模型相当的样本质量，同时仅使用两个采样步骤。

title: Evaluating fairness in ChatGPT
titleZh: 评估ChatGPT中的公平性
summary: We've analyzed how ChatGPT responds to users based on their name, using AI research assistants to protect privacy.

highlights: We've analyzed how ChatGPT responds to users based on their name, using AI research assistants to protect privacy.
highlightsZh: 我们分析了ChatGPT如何使用人工智能研究助手保护隐私，根据用户的姓名对其做出响应。

title: MLE-bench: Evaluating Machine Learning Agents on Machine Learning Engineering
titleZh: MLE-bench ：评估机器学习工程中的机器学习代理
summary: We introduce MLE-bench, a benchmark for measuring how well AI agents perform at machine learning engineering.
summaryZh: 我们引入了MLE-bench ，这是衡量人工智能代理在机器学习工程中的表现的基准。
highlights: We introduce MLE-bench, a benchmark for measuring how well AI agents perform at machine learning engineering.
highlightsZh: 我们引入了MLE-bench ，这是衡量人工智能代理在机器学习工程中的表现的基准。

title: An update on disrupting deceptive uses of AI
titleZh: 关于颠覆人工智能欺骗性使用的最新消息
summary: OpenAI’s mission is to ensure that artificial general intelligence benefits all of humanity. We are dedicated to identifying, preventing, and disrupting attempts to abuse our models for harmful ends.
summaryZh: OpenAI的使命是确保通用人工智能造福全人类。我们致力于识别、预防和破坏滥用我们的模型以达到有害目的的企图。
highlights: OpenAI’s mission is to ensure that artificial general intelligence benefits all of humanity.
We are dedicated to identifying, preventing, and disrupting attempts to abuse our models for harmful ends.
highlightsZh: OpenAI的使命是确保通用人工智能造福全人类。我们致力于识别、预防和破坏滥用我们的模型以达到有害目的的企图。

title: New Credit Facility Enhances Financial Flexibility
titleZh: 新的信贷融通增强了财务灵活性
summary: In addition to securing $6.6 billion in new funding from leading investors, we have established a new $4 billion credit facility with leading banks, including JPMorgan Chase, Citi, Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, Santander, Wells Fargo, SMBC, UBS, and HSBC.
summaryZh: 除了从领先投资者那里获得66亿美元的新资金外，我们还与摩根大通、花旗、高盛、摩根士丹利、桑坦德、富国银行、SMBC、瑞银和汇丰等领先银行建立了40亿美元的新信贷额度。
highlights: In addition to securing $6.6 billion in new funding from leading investors, we have established a new $4 billion credit facility with leading banks, including JPMorgan Chase, Citi,
highlightsZh: 除了从领先投资者那里获得66亿美元的新资金外，我们还与摩根大通、花旗、高盛、摩根士丹利、桑坦德、富国银行、SMBC、瑞银和汇丰等领先银行建立了40亿美元的新信贷额度。
